subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be the peace of God, the Sovereign, the Mighty, the All-Loving! For some time now from the presence of Afnán - peace be upon him - [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک سلام الله الملک العزیز الودود مدتیست از جناب افنان علیه سلام
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @praise and encouragement
